title: Cookie Policy
body_content:
Cookie Policy

Last updated: April 2026

What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to website owners.

How We Use Cookies

Quick Sale South West uses only essential cookies necessary for the website to function correctly. We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies or analytics cookies without your consent.

Essential Cookies

These cookies are required for the website to operate and cannot be switched off. They include:

  • ✔ Session cookies that keep you logged in during your visit
  • ✔ Security cookies that protect against cross-site request forgery
  • ✔ Cookies that remember your cookie preferences

Third Party Cookies

We do not currently use any third party cookies or tracking services on this website.

Managing Cookies

You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this website. For more information on managing cookies visit aboutcookies.org.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about our use of cookies please contact us at info@quicksalesouthwest.co.uk

💰 Get My Free Cash Offer
description: Learn about Quick Sale South West's cookie policy, including what cookies are and how we use them on our website.

title: Privacy Policy
body_content:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

Who We Are

Quick Sale South West is a direct cash house buying service operating across Cornwall, Devon and Somerset. Our website address is: https://quicksalesouthwest.co.uk

What Information We Collect

When you use our contact form, we collect the following information:

  • ✔ Your full name
  • ✔ Your phone number
  • ✔ Your email address
  • ✔ The address of the property you wish to sell
  • ✔ Any additional information you choose to provide

How We Use Your Information

We use the information you provide solely to respond to your enquiry and provide you with a cash offer for your property. We will never sell your data to third parties or use it for marketing purposes without your consent.

How Long We Keep Your Data

We retain your enquiry details for up to 12 months. If you would like your data deleted sooner, please contact us and we will action this within 30 days.

Your Rights

Under UK GDPR you have the right to:

  • ✔ Access the personal data we hold about you
  • ✔ Request correction of inaccurate data
  • ✔ Request deletion of your data
  • ✔ Object to processing of your data

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at info@quicksalesouthwest.co.uk

💰 Get My Free Cash Offer
description: Privacy Policy for Quick Sale South West, detailing how your information is collected and used.

title: About Us
body_content:
About Quick Sale South West

Quick Sale South West are direct cash house buyers based in the South West of England. We are not estate agents or middlemen — we purchase properties ourselves using our own funds, giving you a guaranteed, stress-free sale.

We have helped hundreds of homeowners across Cornwall, Devon and Somerset sell quickly and safely, handling every transaction professionally with trusted UK solicitors.

What We Do

We buy any property, in any condition, across Cornwall, Devon and Somerset. Whether you are facing repossession, going through probate, relocating, or simply need a fast sale, we provide a straightforward cash offer with no fees and no delays.

  • ✔ Genuine cash buyers — we purchase properties ourselves
  • ✔ No estate agent fees or hidden costs
  • ✔ We cover legal costs in most cases
  • ✔ Flexible completion — move in your timeframe
  • ✔ Experienced with probate, repossession and sensitive situations

Our Promise

We believe selling your home should be simple. Every offer we make is fair, transparent and obligation-free. We will never pressure you into a decision and we are always honest about what we can offer and why.

If you need to sell your house fast in the South West, we are here to help.

Get My Free Cash Offer
💰 Get My Free Cash Offer
description: Quick Sale South West offers direct cash property purchases in the South West of England, including Cornwall, Devon, and Somerset.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
body_content:
Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about selling your house fast with Quick Sale South West.

How fast can I sell my house?

Most sales complete within 7–21 days, depending on your circumstances. In some cases we can complete even faster if needed.

Do you really buy houses in any condition?

Yes, we buy properties as they are — no repairs, cleaning or renovation needed. We regularly purchase damaged, flood-affected, fire-damaged and properties in need of full renovation.

Are there any fees or charges?

No. There are no estate agent fees, no hidden charges, and we cover legal costs in most cases. What we offer is what you receive.

How do I know you are a genuine buyer?

We are direct UK cash buyers and work with professional solicitors to complete every purchase securely. We purchase properties using our own funds — we are not estate agents or middlemen.

What if I change my mind?

All offers are completely free and carry no obligation. You are under no pressure to accept and can withdraw at any point.

How much will I realistically get for a fast cash sale?

We base every offer on current market value, your property's condition and your desired timeline. Our offers are fair and transparent. Many sellers find the convenience, speed and guaranteed sale outweigh achieving full market value through a slower traditional route.

Can you buy my tenanted or rental property?

Yes — we regularly purchase tenanted properties with sitting tenants and handle the process smoothly with minimal disruption.

What areas do you cover?

We buy houses across Cornwall, Devon and Somerset including Truro, Falmouth, Penzance, Newquay, Exeter, Plymouth, Torquay, Taunton, Yeovil, Bridgwater and all surrounding areas.

What types of property do you buy?

We buy houses, flats, bungalows, cottages, tenanted properties, probate properties and properties at risk of repossession — in any condition across the South West.

Still Have Questions?

Get in touch and we will be happy to help with no obligation.

Contact Us Today
💰 Get My Free Cash Offer
description: Learn about our fast home selling service with Quick Sale South West, including how quickly you can sell your house and why we're the right choice for buyers.

title: How It Works
body_content:
How Our Quick House Sale Process Works

Selling your house with Quick Sale South West is simple, straightforward and stress-free. Here is how it works from start to finish.

1

Request Your Free Cash Offer

Fill in our simple contact form or give us a call. Tell us about your property and your situation and we will get back to you within 24–48 hours with a no-obligation cash offer.

2

Simple Property Check

We arrange a quick viewing or video call at a time that suits you. There are no lengthy surveys, no repeated viewings and no delays. We assess the property and confirm our offer.

3

Complete Your Sale

We handle the entire legal process using trusted UK solicitors. You choose the completion date that suits you and we complete in as little as 7 days. No chains, no fall-throughs, no stress.

Why It Really Is That Simple

  • ✔ No estate agent fees or hidden costs
  • ✔ We cover legal costs in most cases
  • ✔ No chain — we are direct cash buyers
  • ✔ No repairs or cleaning required
  • ✔ You choose the completion date
  • ✔ Completely confidential and no obligation

Ready to Get Started?

Request your free cash offer today and take the stress out of selling your house fast in the South West.

Get My Free Cash Offer
💰 Get My Free Cash Offer

We clear all types of property — family homes, bungalows, flats, cottages, and rural properties across {{ page.location_county }}. Whether you need a full clearance or a partial clearance of selected rooms, we handle everything carefully and efficiently.

We understand that arranging a house clearance in {{ page.location_name }} can be a difficult and emotional time. Our team works with sensitivity and discretion, treating every property and its contents with the utmost respect.

What We Clear in {{ page.location_name }}

🛋️ Furniture

Sofas, beds, wardrobes, tables, chairs, and all other household furniture removed and disposed of responsibly.

📦 General Contents

Clothing, kitchenware, ornaments, books, toys, and all general household contents cleared efficiently.

🍽️ White Goods and Appliances

Fridges, freezers, washing machines, ovens, and other appliances removed safely and disposed of correctly.

🌿 Garden Waste

Garden furniture, tools, sheds, and green waste cleared from outdoor spaces across {{ page.location_name }}.

🗂️ Paperwork and Personal Effects

Documents, photographs, and personal belongings handled with care and sensitivity throughout the clearance.

🏚️ Entire Property Contents

Full end-to-end clearance of every room in the property, leaving it completely empty and clean.

Common Reasons for House Clearance in {{ page.location_name }}

🕯️ Bereavement and Probate

Clearing a loved one's home in {{ page.location_name }} after a bereavement is one of the most common reasons people contact us. We handle every clearance with the sensitivity and care it deserves.

🏠 Vacant Properties

Vacant properties in {{ page.location_name }} that have been empty for months or years often accumulate contents that need clearing before the property can be used or let.

👴 Downsizing

Homeowners in {{ page.location_name }} moving to a smaller property often need to clear furniture and possessions that will not fit in their new home.

🏡 End of Tenancy

Landlords in {{ page.location_name }} often require a full clearance after a tenancy ends, particularly where tenants have left belongings behind.

🔑 Property Renovation

Properties in {{ page.location_name }} being renovated or refurbished need to be fully cleared before work begins. We remove all contents quickly to keep your project on schedule.

🧹 Hoarding Clearance

We provide non-judgmental, professional hoarding clearance in {{ page.location_name }}, working carefully and respectfully to clear even the most challenging of properties.
